title: Swinney would 'consider' banning US military planes from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Swinney would 'consider' banning US military planes from Prestwick Airport. First Minister John Swinney has said he would consider banning US military aircraft from using Prestwick Airport if it was confirmed they...
